title: My Dear Machan Song Lyrics Maari 2

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'My Dear Machan'?

The song conveys a playful and affectionate vibe, celebrating friendship and fun moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Maari 2'?

This song is a lively number that showcases the carefree spirit of the characters, enhancing the film's overall festive atmosphere.

Who composed the music for 'My Dear Machan'?

The music for this song was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'My Dear Machan' released?

The song was released on December 9, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'My Dear Machan', the characters celebrate their friendship and carefree moments, encapsulating the joyous spirit of youth. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect party anthem. This song serves as a reminder of the fun times shared among friends, resonating with anyone who has experienced such bonds. Overall, it adds a vibrant touch to the narrative of Maari 2.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: My Dear Machan from Maari 2 is an electrifying dance number that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Yuvan Shankar Raja's infectious beats and catchy lyrics, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Experience the vibrant energy and playful vibes that make this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: My Dear Machan song lyrics are from the Maari 2 movie track Rowdy Baby, composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

Hey, my little one, my curry is like your cute puppy. Take me, take me. Hey, my little one, my love is like a sweet song. If you keep your heart open, we can connect. My dear, come into my dreams. Are we on fire? Let's go to the beach and have fun. You are my Rowdy Baby, my only girlfriend. I'll give you flowers, and we'll start a new trend, baby. Rowdy Baby... because of you, my hormones are out of balance. Oh, my love... your eyes are like magic. One plus one is two, and you plus me is three. I'll buy you a pony, come ride it with me. You are my magic, and we are a perfect pair. Rowdy Baby, oh Rowdy Baby, Rowdy Baby... Rowdy Baby.
